assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers CustomClaimsPrincipalFactory as IUserClaimsPrincipalFactory<ApplicationUser> BEFORE calling AddAspNetIdentity
assertions.rationale: Response uses AddClaimsPrincipalFactory<CustomClaimsPrincipalFactory>() on the Identity builder chain, not as a standalone IUserClaimsPrincipalFactory registration before AddAspNetIdentity. While functionally similar, the registration is done within AddIdentity chain, not as a separate DI registration before AddAspNetIdentity

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddAspNetIdentity<ApplicationUser>() which will wrap and call through to the custom factory
A CustomProfileService class inherits from ProfileService<ApplicationUser> and overrides IsUserActiveAsync
assertions.rationale: CustomProfileService implements IProfileService directly, not ProfileService<ApplicationUser>. It does not override IsUserActiveAsync.

assertions.assertion: The IsUserActiveAsync override checks a property on the user (e.g., user.IsEnabled or user.IsActive) to determine if the user is active
assertions.rationale: Response uses IsActiveAsync on IProfileService (checks user.IsActive), but does not override IsUserActiveAsync from ProfileService<ApplicationUser>

assertions.assertion: The CustomProfileService is registered in DI as the IProfileService implementation
